expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Benchmark alignment (phase4a, advisory)”, it explicitly lists the four focus areas: “Prompt handling”, “Template save”, “Report builder loading”, and “Visible report title outcomes”, and the scenario sections include “Prompt handling…”, “Save / Save As flows”, “Report Builder loads…”, and “Visible report title outcomes…”.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled “Phase 4a scenario drafting” and states it is a “Phase 4a subcategory-only scenario draft”, using nested atomic steps with observable verification leaves and avoiding canonical top-layer categories; execution_notes.md also notes this is “scenario drafting only (contract-structure compliance + benchmark-focus coverage)”.
